response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with excellent open-source contributions and deep technical expertise. However, he falls short of the executive-level operational leadership, formal IT consulting client-advisory, and project management experience required for this Head of Development role. Crucially, his resume indicates only basic German skills, whereas the role strictly requires a minimum C1 proficiency.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience developing modern software systems and microservices.
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux, and event-driven architecture.
Proven track record of mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops and Dojos.
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a Basic level, missing the strict C1 requirement.
Lacks executive-level operational leadership and formal IT consulting client-advisory experience.
No explicit mention of UML expertise, formal project management, or IT security compliance.
